findings.title: Remove checked-in assistant conversation transcript
findings.impact: This new `.conversations` artifact is not source, tests, documentation, or repo context, yet it records an implementation dialogue and partial intermediate code. Future maintainers now have another large, stale narrative to search through and may mistake abandoned reasoning or snippets for authoritative design context.
findings.fix: Delete the `.conversations/8c2f0b5d-3e4a-4b9c-8d2f-1b3c4d5e6f70.jsonl` file from the PR. If any rationale is worth preserving, move a short source-backed summary into the relevant design doc or code comments.

findings.title: Keep test-only tracker inspection out of the production API
findings.impact: `GetCurrentSampleCountForTest()` is exposed on the production `UrmaSuccessRateTracker` type solely for tests. That makes the runtime class carry test vocabulary and encourages future production call sites to depend on internal counter state instead of the tracker contract.
findings.fix: Hide this accessor behind a test-only build guard, move it to a test helper/friend fixture, or expose only production-meaningful diagnostics without the `ForTest` API.
